name: The lawn
description:
You are standing on a lush, green lawn.  The grass is just high enough to
cushion your feet without appearing to be mowed.  Trees, of all shapes and
sizes, provide shade from the searing sun.  To your north, you can see more of
this huge land.  To your south stands a majestic tree.  Off to the west is the
beautiful city of Caras Galadon.  To your east is a beautiful fountain of
silver.  A sense of peace fills your soul.  Breathe deeply and taste the fresh
air....
